title: Imap2gmail – A self-contained mass-migrations orchestrator for Gmail
abstract: Tired of manually migrating emails to Gmail one by one? Fear not, Imap2gmail is here to save the day! This self-contained migration orchestrator makes your email relocation a breeze, leaving you with more time for what matters. Give it a try and see the difference!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也厌倦了手动一个接一个地迁移到Gmail？别担心，Imap2gmail就是你的救星！这是一款自带迁移工具的大师级神器，让你的邮件搬家瞬间完成，从此告别繁琐。快来试试吧！
